mapper.select: SELECT ADMIN_USER_ID, LOGIN_ID, PASSWORD, USER_NAME, ROLE, STATUS, LOGIN_FAIL_COUNT, LOCKED_AT, PASSWORD_CHANGED_AT, PASSWORD_EXPIRE_YN, FORCE_PWD_CHANGE_YN, LAST_LOGIN_AT, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT FROM TB_ADMIN_USER WHERE LOGIN_ID = #{loginId}

SELECT ADMIN_USER_ID, LOGIN_ID, PASSWORD, USER_NAME, ROLE, STATUS, LOGIN_FAIL_COUNT, LOCKED_AT, PASSWORD_CHANGED_AT, PASSWORD_EXPIRE_YN, FORCE_PWD_CHANGE_YN, LAST_LOGIN_AT, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT FROM TB_ADMIN_USER WHERE ADMIN_USER_ID = #{adminUserId}

SELECT ADMIN_USER_ID, LOGIN_ID, PASSWORD, USER_NAME, ROLE, STATUS, LOGIN_FAIL_COUNT, LOCKED_AT, PASSWORD_CHANGED_AT, PASSWORD_EXPIRE_YN, FORCE_PWD_CHANGE_YN, LAST_LOGIN_AT, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT FROM TB_ADMIN_USER ORDER BY LOGIN_ID
mapper.insert:
SELECT nextval('SEQ_ADMIN_USER')
INSERT INTO TB_ADMIN_USER ( ADMIN_USER_ID, LOGIN_ID, PASSWORD, USER_NAME, ROLE, STATUS, LOGIN_FAIL_COUNT, LOCKED_AT, PASSWORD_CHANGED_AT, PASSWORD_EXPIRE_YN, FORCE_PWD_CHANGE_YN, LAST_LOGIN_AT, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{adminUserId}, #{loginId}, #{password}, #{userName}, #{role}, #{status}, #{loginFailCount}, #{lockedAt}, #{passwordChangedAt}, #{passwordExpireYn}, #{forcePwdChangeYn}, #{lastLoginAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )

SELECT SEQ_ADMIN_USER.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO TB_ADMIN_USER ( ADMIN_USER_ID, LOGIN_ID, PASSWORD, USER_NAME, ROLE, STATUS, LOGIN_FAIL_COUNT, LOCKED_AT, PASSWORD_CHANGED_AT, PASSWORD_EXPIRE_YN, FORCE_PWD_CHANGE_YN, LAST_LOGIN_AT, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{adminUserId}, #{loginId}, #{password}, #{userName}, #{role}, #{status}, #{loginFailCount}, #{lockedAt}, #{passwordChangedAt}, #{passwordExpireYn}, #{forcePwdChangeYn}, #{lastLoginAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_ADMIN_USER SET STATUS = 'ACTIVE', LOGIN_FAIL_COUNT = 0, LOCKED_AT = NULL WHERE ADMIN_USER_ID = #{adminUserId}
